sentences.arabic: الْبَرْمَجَةُ هِيَ اللُّغَةُ الَّتِي تَفْهَمُهَا أَجْهِزَةُ الْحَاسُوبِ.
sentences.translation: Programiranje je jezik koji računarski uređaji razumiju.
sentences.translationEn: Programming is the language that computer devices understand.

sentences.arabic: يَتَعَلَّمُ الْأَطْفَالُ كَيْفِيَّةَ كِتَابَةِ رُمُوزٍ بَسِيطَةٍ فِي الْمَدَارِسِ.
sentences.translation: Djeca u školama uče kako pisati jednostavne kodove.
sentences.translationEn: Children learn how to write simple codes in schools.

sentences.arabic: تُسَاعِدُ هَذِهِ الْمَهَارَةُ فِي تَطْوِيرِ الْمَنْطِقِ وَحَلِّ الْمُشْكِلَاتِ.
sentences.translation: Ova vještina pomaže u razvoju logike i rješavanju problema.
sentences.translationEn: This skill helps in developing logic and problem-solving.
